jd_text: You will build and run the operational and governance engine for a new business school in Dubai. This is a founding leadership role responsible for getting the institution ready to launch and scale - including accreditation readiness coordination, institutional policies and operating model, academic operations, board governance, and external partnerships support . It is a builder/operator role with real accountability. Founding institutional operator + governance lead + accreditation quarterback + partnerships hustler. This person will: Build the operating system of the school (policies, committees, processes, templates, cadence) Run/coordinate licensing + accreditation workstreams with the Quality/Accreditation lead Build org structure + hiring plan (faculty + admin) with leadership Set up board mechanics (secretary role, agendas, minutes, actions) Drive international partnerships (MoUs, dual degrees, articulation, validation models) Support fundraising/external relations (donors, sponsors) Must Have 15+ years in higher education operations / academic administration / institutional development. Proven track record in building institutional infrastructure (policies, governance, operating model) in a new or scaling environment. Hands-on experience supporting or delivering accreditation/licensing readiness (UAE and/or international frameworks). Strong board/committee governance experience (minutes, action tracking, confidentiality, compliance). Strong stakeholder management skills — can influence senior leaders without formal authority. Fluent English; Arabic is an advantage.
